text: Cable News Network filed a copyright-infringement action against Perplexity AI, alleging Perplexity reproduced and summarized CNN content in its AI answer engine without authorization. Filed in the Southern District of New York on 2026-05-28 (No. 1:26-cv-04427), cause 17:501 copyright infringement.
canonical_source_conflicted: CNN copyrighted news content and 17 U.S.C. § 501
mitigation_gap: Alleged ingestion and reproduction of copyrighted content without licensing or adequate attribution controls in the AI answer pipeline.
reliance_or_harm: CNN alleges market and licensing harm from AI reproduction of its journalism.
